title: Fix TOTP security: encrypt secret, add auth, hide secret in response, add bounds check
acceptance_criteria: TOTP secret encrypted with AES-256-GCM using key derived from OPENSOFA_SECRET env var
All TOTP routes wrapped with createAuthMiddleware
API response no longer returns 'secret' field (only 'qrUri')
Array bounds checking added for dynamic truncate: if (offset + 4 > hmac.length) throw
